title: Scalded [LEGACY]
description: A mod that adds many cool stuff.
body:
This is scalded, a mod full of new items, blocks, and more.


<details>
<summary>Advanced Weapons</summary>

There are new weapons called advanced weapons, which currently there are 3 types,
Honed Sword, Spear and the Battleaxe.
![Crafting a iron spear](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d90f4a9b69bbefa217c24e822fa1f5e3fd59154_0.webp)

## _How to craft:_

  _Spear: Sword|Ingot/Slab|Arrow_
  
  _Honed Sword: Sword|Ingot/Slab|Stick_
 
  _Battleaxe: Sword|Ingot/Slab|Bone_
  
# Legendary Weapons
# 
There is also legendary weapons you can craft.
![The two of the legendary weapons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/86244280b322861b6858ce524219be27779b5199.png)

There is a tag 
 ```scald:advanced_weapons```
 that can be used for any addons or mod support.


</details>




<details>
<summary>Magic</summary>

The first step in magic is crafting a starcoating core,


Then using that you can obtain Stargems which are essential for crafting magic items, using Stargems you can craft spellbooks and power runes which are ammo for magic.


Also there is a wizard proffesion that stations at a Starcoating Core.



</details>












<details>
<summary>Other</summary>

This mod adds chesse which gives you glowing, and the corrupt zombie which is a more powerful version of the zombie.

![The corrupt zombie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d1274d708f76941e58762ecd41b580ab591e074f.png)


Also has 2 new paintings



</details>

Also Has [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat) Compatabillity
